frax-fx-cluster.name: Frax FX Markets
frax-fx-cluster.description: Borrow frxUSD against BRZ collateral on Base.

venice-vvv-usdc.name: Venice VVV / USDC
venice-vvv-usdc.description: Borrow VVV against USDC collateral, or borrow USDC against VVV collateral on Base. Curated by Alpha Growth.

venice-eth.name: Venice ETH
venice-eth.description: Borrow ETH against USDC or VVV collateral on Base. Curated by Alpha Growth.

zro-cluster.name: LayerZero ZRO
zro-cluster.description: Borrow ZRO against USDC or ETH collateral, or use ZRO as collateral to borrow USDC/ETH on Base. Curated by Alpha Growth.
